chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 74, 2586, 2587 & 5508 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 277/2022 2. For hearing of main case 07.02.2025 Messrs. Ali Almani, Ms. Lubna Pervaiz advocate for Ms. Ismatunnisa, Furqan Mushtaq, advocates for the petitioners Messrs. Qaim Ali Memon, Ameer Nausherwan Adil, Zeeshan Ahmed, Faheem Ali, advocates for the respondents Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, these petitions assail show cause notice/s. It is stated that it may be just and proper for the said notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that petitioners be permitted to raise legal objections including those with respect to the preceding audit notices. It is further sought that pending adjudication to the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for respondents articulate no cavil in such regard and states that these petitions may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
